member.name: T:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.Document
member.summary: Represents a PDF document uploaded by a User in the system.

member.name: M:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.Document.Create(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a new pending document.

member.name: M:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.Document.MarkProcessed(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Marks the document as successfully processed and ready for viewing.

member.name: T:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken
member.summary: Represents a secure refresh token used to obtain new JWT access tokens without requiring the user to re-authenticate.

member.name: P:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the refresh token record.

member.name: P:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.Token
member.summary: Gets or sets the cryptographically secure token string.

member.name: P:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the user who owns this refresh token.

member.name: P:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.ExpiresAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when this token expires.

member.name: P:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when this token was created.

member.name: P:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.RevokedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time if this token was revoked. A non-null value indicates the token is no longer valid.

member.name: P:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.IsExpired
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the token has expired.

member.name: P:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.IsActive
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the token is currently active and usable.

member.name: M:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.Create(System.Guid,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new RefreshToken instance.
member.param: The number of days until the token expires.

member.name: M:PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.Revoke
member.summary: Marks the refresh token as revoked, effectively invalidating it.

member.name: T:PeDeYaf.Domain.Repositories.IDocumentRepository
member.summary: Defines repository operations for managing Document entities.

member.name: M:PeDeYaf.Domain.Repositories.IDocumentRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a document by its unique identifier.

member.name: M:PeDeYaf.Domain.Repositories.IDocumentRepository.GetByIdsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Guid},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves multiple documents by their identifiers.

member.name: M:PeDeYaf.Domain.Repositories.IDocumentRepository.AddAsync(PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.Document,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a new document to the repository.

member.name: M:PeDeYaf.Domain.Repositories.IDocumentRepository.UpdateAsync(PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.Document,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing document in the repository.

member.name: M:PeDeYaf.Domain.Repositories.IDocumentRepository.DeleteAsync(PeDeYaf.Domain.Entities.Document,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a document from the repository.
